messages.content: Can you translate this japanese text in english :  ヤガの深奥に潜入したブランは、数々の苦難を乗り越え、地下の聖堂で老僧ソラ・ウィンと遭遇した。ミロク教本来の教えを体現する老僧の力を借りて、ブランはじわじわと反撃を開始する。一方、パロから逃れたヴァレリウス一行は、事件を起こしながらも魔道師になることを決心したアッシャの身柄の扱いをめぐり、またリギアの負傷もあってワルド城に留まっていた。そこへヴァレリウスを訪ねて思いがけない人物がやってきた!

Buran, who infiltrated the depths of Yaga, overcame numerous hardships and encountered the old monk Sora Win in the underground sanctuary. Borrowing the power of the old monk who embodies the teachings of the original Miroku religion, Buran slowly begins to counterattack. On the other hand, Valerius and his party, who escaped from Paro, remained at Wald Castle due to the handling of Asha's capture, who had decided to become a mage despite causing the incident, and also because of Ligea's injury. Unexpectedly, an unexpected person came to visit Valerius!

他の方も書いていますが、久し振りにグインサーガらしいお話でした。
正直、栗本グインも後半はすこし冗長な感があり、惰性で読んでいるという思いもありました。展開はあるのですが同じような場所をぐるぐる廻っているようなもどかしさを感じていました。
それが少し動いてきたように思います。
あとがきでの「おわり」方へのビジョンも安心できました。

Others have also mentioned, but it was a story that felt like a return to the classic Guin Saga after a long time. Honestly, in the latter half, there was a bit of a feeling of redundancy in Kaoru Kurimoto's writing, and at times I felt like I was reading out of habit. While there were developments, there was also a sense of frustration, as it felt like going around in circles in similar places. However, it seems like things have started to move a little bit. The vision for the ending in the afterword also provided a sense of reassurance.

やっぱり筆者が二人いるとそれぞれのこだわりが見えてくるので読みづらい。
そして内容の割に刊行ペースが遅いのでまた途中で頓挫しそうな気がする。まぁ栗本先生と比較してしまうのもかわいそうだけど、とにかく最終巻まですすめてほしい。

I understand that it can be difficult to read when there are two authors with their own individual styles and preferences. Additionally, the slow publication pace in relation to the content makes it feel like there's a possibility of it getting stalled again midway. Comparing it to Kaoru Kurimoto's work may not be fair, but regardless, I hope they continue progressing towards the final volume.

相変わらず面白いし、場面が次々変わるのも、これはこれで自分は良いと思うが、誤植や変換ミスがやっぱり気になるのと、今回一番気になったのは、アウロラとパリスの邂逅。
『売国妃シルヴィア』のラストで二人は敵同士として会っているはず。
なのに今回初めて知った様なアウロラの反応。
前回はパリスがフードを被っていたのかも知れない、とか、アウロラはあの時大怪我をしていたから記憶が無くなってしまったのかも知れない、てのも何か無理がある。
シルヴィアを拐った敵を忘れるか？
せめて今回、名前を聞いたとたんに｢あ！あの時のあいつか！！｣て思い出すかとおもいきや、それもなし。

ただの一読者でも覚えてる事を、作者が違うとはいえ、物語を書く人が忘れているのが残念でした。

あと、アウロラは女らしい部分もあるとは思うが、戦っている時には｢だめぇっ！｣なんて女みたいな叫び方は絶対しないと思う。
｢やめろ！！｣だよね。笑

I understand that it's still interesting and that the rapid change of scenes can be enjoyable in its own way. However, I can see why typos and errors in conversion would still be bothersome. What bothered me the most this time was the encounter between Aurora and Paris. In the ending of "The Traitor Princess Sylvia," they should have met as enemies. Yet, Aurora's reaction in this volume seems like she's hearing about Paris for the first time. It's hard to believe that Paris was wearing a hood during their previous encounter, or that Aurora lost her memory due to a serious injury. Did she forget the enemy who kidnapped Sylvia? I would have at least expected her to instantly remember and think, "Ah! It's that person from back then!" upon hearing the name. But that didn't happen either.

It's disappointing that even as just one reader, I remember these things while the author, even though they may be different, seems to have forgotten. 

Also, while I do think Aurora has feminine aspects, I can't imagine her screaming something like "No way!" in a girly manner while fighting. It would be more like "Stop!" right? (laughs)
アルド・ナリスの妖しい力を目撃したグイン一行はいったいクリスタルを離れることにする。しかしそこへ新たに闇からの脅威が襲いかかる!一方、沿海州ヴァラキアでは、ボルゴ・ヴァレンが、反対を受けながらも執拗にクリスタルへの派兵を画策し、モンゴールでは、国を顧みようとしないイシュトヴァーンへの不満から、その不在を突いて、反乱のうねりが高まっていた。パロの崩壊は、各地に不穏な情勢をもたらしていた。

The Guin party, who witnessed Aldo Naris' mysterious power, decide to leave Crystal. However, a new threat from the darkness strikes! Meanwhile, in the coastal province of Valachia, Borgo Valen persistently plans to deploy troops to Crystal despite opposition. In Mongaul, dissatisfaction with Ishthavan, who neglects the country's affairs, leads to a growing wave of rebellion, taking advantage of his absence. The collapse of Paro brings about an unsettling situation in various places.
ドリアン王子を正統なゴーラ王として擁立した反乱軍を討伐するため、イシュトヴァーンは自ら軍を率いてトーラスへ向かうのだった。
In order to suppress the rebellion that supports Prince Dorian as the legitimate King of Gorra, Ishthavan leads his own troops and heads towards Torus.

書きたい記事の内容はいっぱいあるんですけど、絵が描き上がらないので保留してしまう。
ちょっと勘違いしちゃいけないですね。本当は、イラストなんてどうでもいいんだ。

 

今日はようやく、グインサーガの最新刊を読み終わりました。

There are many topics I want to write articles about, but I'm putting them on hold because the illustrations aren't finished yet. But I shouldn't misunderstand things. The truth is, I don't really care about the illustrations.

Today, I finally finished reading the latest volume of the Guin Saga.
The Challenge of the Leopard-headed King
